prompt: [Style] High-quality realistic photography. Theme: "Traditional Costume Fashion Collage of Ten Countries". Magazine/social media-grade visuals for people/characters. Natural textures, cinematic tones, modern and elegant commercial photography. Avoid AI synthetic feel. [Composition] 16:9 wide aspect ratio. Fashion collage configuration of 2 rows x 5 columns. Arrangement where all ten figures look like the same person in different outfits. Do not cut off important parts of the face, hands, hairstyle, headpiece, or costume. Background is clean with negative space, slightly emphasizing the central figure. [Subject] A fictional Japanese woman around 20 years old. Maintain the same facial features, eyes, nose, lips, contour, skin tone, and body type. Change only the costume, hairstyle, hair accessories, makeup, and pose for each country. Expressed not as ten different people, but as ten transformations of one woman. [Costumes/Hairstyles/Makeup/Actions/Labels] Japan: Kimono, low bun, kanzashi, transparent white skin makeup, red lips. Lightly holding the sleeve, looking back slightly. Label "日本". China: Hanfu or Qipao style, elegant bun, hair accessories, thin eyeliner, soft rouge. Holding a round fan or adjusting the collar. Label "中国". Korea: Hanbok, low bun with center part, natural glass skin, pale pink lips. Standing with hands lightly overlapping. Label "韓国". India: Sari, side part or low bun, bindi, earrings, warm eye makeup and gold highlights. Lightly holding the edge of the sari. Label "インド". Vietnam: Ao Dai, long straight hair or half-up, natural and clean makeup. Holding a non la or looking slightly to the side. Label "ベトナム". Thailand: Traditional Thai ceremonial dress, high bun, gold hair ornaments, elegant gold-brown makeup. Gracefully pressing palms together (wai). Label "タイ". Mongolia: Deel, long braids or twin braids, traditional hat or forehead ornaments, healthy natural makeup. Lightly holding the sash or shawl. Label "モンゴル". Morocco: Kaftan, wavy long hair or low bun, metal decorations, subtle smoky eyes. Lightly touching the embroidery on the sleeve. Label "モロッコ". Mexico: Traditional embroidered dress, braided hair or low bun, floral hair ornaments, vivid but elegant lips. Lightly holding the skirt to show the embroidery. Label "メキシコ". Scotland: Tartan traditional costume or shawl, natural wavy hair or half-up, soft natural makeup. Lightly holding the tartan cloth. Label "スコットランド". [Scene] High-end photo studio based on light gray and cream white. Create depth with translucent glass, acrylic layers, low display stands, and soft shadows. Place small, readable Japanese labels near each person. No English, logos, watermarks, or meaningless symbols. [Lighting] Soft natural light from the front left. Weak rim light on the right side. Cinematic ambient light. Avoid blown-out highlights and preserve shadow detail. Unified color temperature and color grading. [Details] High-definition representation of fabric weave, embroidery, silk luster, cotton and linen texture, metal accessories, hair, skin texture, makeup, and clothing wrinkles. Label text is clear and readable. [Quality Keywords] High definition, realistic texture, clear subject, stable composition, unified colors, professional post-processing, clean outlines, natural body proportions, magazine cover level. [Avoid] Faces that look like different people, age changes, cultural confusion, excessive makeup, low resolution, distorted hands, too many limbs, facial collapse, incorrect perspective, plastic skin, excessive skin smoothing, garbled characters, English characters, long text, watermarks, logos, brand displays, meaningless symbols, incorrect national flags, rough synthesis, crowded composition.
